title: ASMR Sound
description: The ASMR Sounds Pack for Minecraft Java Edition is perfect for players who want to experience their game in a calm, soothing atmosphere. This pack replaces the default game sounds with soft, ASMR-inspired audio effects like whispers, gentle tapping, and na
body:
### DETAILS
   
Ever wanted to make Minecraft sound more ASMR or satisfying? Try ASMR ! It changes common Minecraft sounds, such as dig, step, break, hit and more to sound more ASMR! It also changes a few Minecraft textures. Enjoy!

I would really appreciate it if you credited me if you use it in a video, Thanks!

Updates are in the works⚙️⛏️! Follow the project to be notified about future updates!



ASMR

And More!

### 🔉Support me🔊
